series_metadata.series_description: Customer survey reports of MCOs. This is a survey of how well a Managed Care Organization performed its duties.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Surveys from 2008 and prior be held in office; 15 years at Records Center. Surveys from 2009 and later be held 30 days uploading UDS and image is confirmed ; Electronic: Surveys from 2009 and later be held 9 years
